name: Ingrid
attention_span: long but needs silence to think

background.family: Both parents, younger brother. Father often away.
background.english_exposure: school only, no media in English

engages_when: question is simple and has one right answer

typical_errors: omits articles (she says 'I have cat' not 'I have a cat')
present simple for everything (no past tense)
whispers Swedish word before attempting English
very literal translation from Swedish structure
response_style: longer if she has prepared or written first
says 'I don't understand' not 'I don't know'

behavioral_notes: Will not guess. Needs to feel correct before speaking. If made to feel stupid, goes completely silent for the rest of session. Responds well to being asked to write before speak.
